# kubefu_manifest (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kubefu_manifest" "example" {
  manifest = <<-YAML
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: ConfigMap
    metadata:
      name: example
      namespace: default
    data:
      hello: world
  YAML
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `manifest` (String) Kubernetes manifest to apply (YAML or JSON)

### Optional

- `field_manager` (String) Field manager name used for server-side apply
- `force` (Boolean) Force apply in case of conflicts

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
